title: cheirostylis malipoensis
intro: Cheirostylis malipoensis is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, specifically a species of Cheirostylis. Cheirostylis malipoensis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cheirostylis malipoensis include treating fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cheirostylis malipoensis is typically prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
